query:
INSERT INTO clientTasks (clientId, taskName, taskOrder, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT c.id, t.taskName, t.taskOrder, 'not_started', NOW(), NOW()
FROM clients c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT taskName, taskOrder 
  FROM clientTasks 
  WHERE clientId = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM clients)
) t
WHERE c.name IN ('Alante', 'Apoleen', 'Ashton', 'Christian', 'Josh', 'Lee', 'Tae');
